title: Change group webhook
excerpt: Is it possible to trigger a webhook when an item moves to a new group? I found a previous thread asking for this same functionality, which was closed (though it doesn’t look like the feature was ever added). Does anyone …

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to trigger a webhook when an item moves to a new group? I found a previous thread asking for this same functionality, which was closed (though it doesn’t look like the feature was ever added). Does anyone have workarounds?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @max
That one is indeed missing. Upvoted the request

posts.author: grzaks (Grzegorz Aksamit)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need it too. The case is a “deal pipeline” where next steps of the pipeline are modeled as board groups. We have an integration with sendgrid transactional mails (via make.com) and need to automatically send some marketing emails when deal is moved from one deal step to another.

Is there any reliable workaround for “webhook on item moved to group” you came up with? The one I’m thinking about is duplicating pipeline steps in the status column, setting it by “set status on item moved to group” automation and then using “webhook on status changed”.
